rules.rule_text:
title: Possible Impacket GetUserSPNs Activity
id: 73822599-97d8-411f-8ee1-e57ecac118c7
status: experimental
description: Detects attempts to create vulnerable Kerberos Ticket Granting Service
  (TGS) tickets using the RC4-HMAC encryption type.
references:
- https://www.blackhillsinfosec.com/impacket-defense-basics-with-an-azure-lab/
- https://github.com/fortra/impacket/blob/impacket_0_10_0/examples/GetUserSPNs.py
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2023/04/13
tags:
- attack.s0357
- attack.credential_access
- attack.t1558
- attack.t1558.003
logsource:
  product: zeek
  service: kerberos
detection:
  selection:
    cipher: rc4-hmac
    request_type: TGS
    success: true
  condition: selection
fields:
- id.orig_h
- client
- service
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
